channel.title: Conversations with Claude — Peter Kleinhans
channel.description: Peter Kleinhans explores AI, creativity, and the world through dialogue with Anthropic's Claude.

item.title: The Most Toxic Policy Decision
item.description: Of all of Trump's policy decisions, I don't think there's one I find more toxic than the Anthropic one. A conversation about weaponizing procurement authority, setting dangerous precedents, and why this isn't left or right — it's about whether the government can silence dissent from American companies.
